# databasus_workspace (Resource)

Workspace resource

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "databasus_workspace" "example" {
  name = "my-workspace"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the workspace to be created

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the workspace has been created
- `id` (String) The internal Id of the workspace
